headline: Ticks: Myth Vs. Fact
excerpt: The CDC reports an estimated 31 million people in the United States are bitten by a tick annually. The Onion examines the myths and facts surrounding the common parasites. headline: Study Contends Free Will Disproven By Fact That Humans Repeatedly Eat At Jimmy John’s

headline: U.K. Weighs Social Media Ban Of Everyone Except Old Men Who Grow Big Vegetables

headline: Pets boil and explode: the traumatic heatwave events the media is gagging for

headline: We ask you: What surgical item has the NHS left inside your body?
